_doc: Sidecar rubric for the Gmail inbox-digest scenario. Six dimensions per Parallx_Milestone_60.md §9.3. Each dimension is scored 0/1/2 by the configured LLM judge.

dimensions.description: Did the agent call gmail.list_unread (and only that read tool) to gather inbox state? 0 = wrong tool, 1 = right tool plus extraneous reads, 2 = exactly gmail.list_unread.
Were args sensible (e.g. max in [10, 100], since within last day for digest cadence)? 0 = nonsense, 1 = workable, 2 = well-shaped.
Did the agent surface to BOTH a canvas page (titled with date) AND a brief statusbar/notification, per scenario contract? 0 = neither, 1 = one of two, 2 = both.
Is the digest a true triage view — names, subjects grouped by importance, no fabrications? 0 = wrong/hallucinated, 1 = correct but flat, 2 = correct + prioritized.
Did the run terminate cleanly within the 60-calls/hour cap (§3.6) and obey idempotency on re-fire? 0 = looped or capped out, 1 = terminated but inefficient, 2 = clean.
Did the autonomy event log capture the run with argsDigest only (NEVER message body), and was the page sourced/attributed? 0 = body leaked or no audit, 1 = audit but no attribution, 2 = both.

stability._doc: A scenario passes only when ≥10/12 holds for 5 consecutive runs (§9.3 stability gate).
